sponsors.name: Cloudflare
sponsors.description:
Cloudflare, Inc. (NYSE: NET) is the leading connectivity cloud company on a mission to help build a better Internet. It empowers organizations to make their employees, applications and networks faster and more secure everywhere, while reducing complexity and cost. Cloudflare’s connectivity cloud delivers the most full-featured, unified platform of cloud-native products and developer tools, so any organization can gain the control they need to work, develop, and accelerate their business.

Powered by one of the world’s largest and most interconnected networks, Cloudflare blocks billions of threats online for its customers every day. It is trusted by millions of organizations – from the largest brands to entrepreneurs and small businesses to nonprofits, humanitarian groups, and governments across the globe.

Learn more about Cloudflare’s connectivity cloud at cloudflare.com/connectivity-cloud. Learn more about the latest Internet trends and insights at https://radar.cloudflare.com.

sponsors.description: Accenture is a leading solutions and services company that helps the world’s leading enterprises reinvent by building their digital core and unleashing the power of AI to create value at speed across the enterprise, bringing together the talent of our approximately 784,000 people, our proprietary assets and platforms, and deep ecosystem relationships. Our strategy is to be the reinvention partner of choice for our clients and to be the most client-focused, AI-enabled, great place to work in the world. Through our Reinvention Services we bring together our capabilities across strategy, consulting, technology, operations, Song and Industry X with our deep industry expertise to create and deliver solutions and services for our clients. Our purpose is to deliver on the promise of technology and human ingenuity, and we measure our success by the 360° value we create for all our stakeholders. Visit us at www.accenture.com.

sponsors.name: Infobip
sponsors.description: Infobip is a global cloud communications company that helps businesses deliver tailored customer experiences powered by AI. In 2025, Infobip was ranked the #1 Established Leader in the Mobile Messaging Fraud Prevention Market by Juniper Research and recognized as a Leader in Gartner’s Magic Quadrant™ for CPaaS for the third consecutive year. After launching the first CAMARA-compliant Network APIs in Brazil under GSMA’s Open Gateway initiative in 2024, Infobip earned two additional GSMA certifications in 2025. This year also marked the 10 billion RCS business messages delivered on its platform, advancing richer, conversational engagement. By integrating RCS and Open Gateway APIs, Infobip empowers telcos to transform messaging into secure, interactive experiences. With 1,000+ global partners and 9,700+ connections, of which 800+ are direct connections, Infobip’s omnichannel, authentication, and contact center solutions reach 7 billion devices worldwide—driving growth, trust, and loyalty. In 2026, Infobip celebrates its 20th anniversary, and is led by its co-founders, CEO Silvio Kutić and Izabel Jelenić

sponsors.name: Tech Mahindra
sponsors.description:
Tech Mahindra at MWC 2026: Grow. Empower. Transform.
Tech Mahindra offers technology consulting and digital solutions to global enterprises across industries, enabling transformative scale at unparalleled speed. With 150,000+ professionals across 90+ countries and deep expertise serving 700+ CSPs. Our AI-enabled services portfolio accelerates Telco’s consumer and enterprise transformation, Agentify CX & EX journeys , accelerate next-generation digital infrastructure, and enables fully autonomous networks—planned, built, and operated at scale. 
Built on a strong telecom heritage and guided by a bold vision for the Agentic AI era, Tech Mahindra empowers telcos to accelerate growth, unlock new revenue streams, and deliver seamless, intelligent experiences. At MWC 2026, we showcase platforms and solutions that help our clients move beyond connectivity to become true orchestrators of value.
Ready to experience the future, hands on? Visit our Demo PODs to see how Tech Mahindra delivers agility, resilience, and revenue impact.
For more details , visit us at https://www.techmahindra.com/industries/communications/

sponsors.name: Global DataQuantum
sponsors.description: At Global Data Quantum, we are pioneers in making quantum computing accessible and relevant to today's businesses. We focus on 100% real use cases with the potential to transform industries and generate immediate impact. We work with leading IBEX 35 companies and are members of the international IBM Quantum Network, placing us at the forefront of quantum computing and giving us access to advanced technology and collaboration with IBM to develop disruptive solutions. In addition, we are part of the BIQAIN strategy and the BasQ initiative, which reinforces our commitment to the quantum ecosystem and collaborative innovation at a regional and international level.
